en: They should all be destroyed. Robert, Robert Muldoon, my game warden from Kenya.
Bit of an alarmist, I'm afraid, but knows more about raptors than anyone.
ko: 조금 과장된 면이 있지만, 맹금류에 대해선 누구보다 잘 알고 있습니다.

en: What kind of metabolism do they have? What's their growth rate?
They're lethal at eight months, and I do mean lethal.
I've hunted most things that can hunt you, but the way these things move...
ko: 당신을 사냥할 수 있는 대부분의 것들을 사냥해봤지만, 이 녀석들이 당신을 사냥하는 방식은...
